'''''Star Wars 2: World of Fire''''' is the second of two ''Star Wars'' [[Marvel Illustrated Books]] reprinting stories first printed in the [[Marvel Comics|Marvel]] [[Star Wars (Marvel UK)|UK ''Star Wars Weekly'']] comic. It reprints the ''[[World of Fire!]]'' story arc previously available only in Marvel UK's ''[[Star Wars Weekly 107]]–[[Star Wars Weekly 115|115]]''. The story is reprinted in black and white.

The story is split into three parts:
#''[[World of Fire!]]''
#''[[The Word for World is Death!]]''
#''[[The Guardian of Forever!]]''
